why: The visible process-improvements backlog was structurally split: queue state held one pipeline, while build-review sidecars and completed-ideas.json still fed a parallel report-only backlog outside normal grading and closure.

intended_outcome.statement: Queue state is the only canonical actionable backlog for idea items, while build-review outputs enter that queue through the normal ideas path and historical archive carry-over is handled explicitly without reviving legacy backlog reads.
